## Dataset Understanding

1. Show first 5 rows
2. Show last 10 rows
3. Find total rows and columns
4. Show all column names
5. Check data types of every column
6. Find missing values in each column
7. Find duplicate rows
8. Count unique values in every column
9. Show dataset information using `info()`
10. Generate summary statistics using `describe()`

---

# Data Cleaning Problems

11. Remove duplicate rows
12. Fill missing values with mean
13. Fill missing values with median
14. Replace null values with `"Unknown"`
15. Convert price column to integer
16. Remove symbols like `₹`, `$`, `%`, `GB`
17. Convert date column into datetime format
18. Rename columns properly
19. Convert text columns to lowercase
20. Remove extra spaces from strings
21. Drop unnecessary columns
22. Replace empty strings with NaN
23. Remove rows with too many missing values
24. Convert RAM column from `"8GB"` → `8`
25. Convert storage column from `"512GB SSD"` → `512`

---

# Filtering Problems

26. Find laptops with 8GB RAM
27. Find products above ₹50,000
28. Find products below average price
29. Find rows where rating > 4
30. Find rows containing `"RTX"`
31. Filter data for specific brand
32. Find products between two prices
33. Find rows with null values
34. Find products with SSD storage
35. Find products released after 2023
36. Find products with Intel processor
37. Find products with 16GB RAM and RTX GPU
38. Find products cheaper than median price
39. Find rows where stock is less than 10
40. Find products with highest rating

---

# Sorting Problems

41. Sort products by highest price
42. Sort products by lowest rating
43. Sort by multiple columns
44. Find top 10 expensive products
45. Find cheapest 5 products
46. Sort alphabetically by brand
47. Find newest products first
48. Sort by RAM and price together
49. Sort by rating descending and price ascending
50. Sort products by storage size

---

# GroupBy Problems

51. Find average price by brand
52. Count products category-wise
53. Find highest priced laptop per brand
54. Find average rating by company
55. Find total sales by region
56. Find mean salary department-wise
57. Find maximum marks subject-wise
58. Find minimum price in every category
59. Count laptops brand-wise
60. Count products with RTX GPU
61. Count products having SSD
62. Count products above ₹1 lakh
63. Count null values in each column
64. Count duplicate rows
65. Count products by RAM size
66. Count products by processor type
67. Count ratings greater than 4
68. Count unique brands
69. Count products released each year
70. Count expensive laptops per brand

---

# Statistical Analysis

71. Find mean price
72. Find median salary
73. Find mode of RAM column
74. Find standard deviation of ratings
75. Find variance of prices
76. Find maximum price
77. Find minimum rating
78. Find correlation between price and rating
79. Find correlation between RAM and price
80. Find percentile values of price

---

# Real Project-Type Tasks

81. Find best value-for-money laptop
82. Find most common processor
83. Count RTX laptops
84. Find brand with highest average price
85. Create discount column
86. Create GST column
87. Export cleaned data to CSV
88. Create pivot table
89. Create charts using Matplotlib
90. Build dashboard using Microsoft Power BI
91. Find sales trend month-wise
92. Predict future sales trend
93. Compare SSD vs HDD laptop prices
94. Find gaming laptops only
95. Create price categories (`Budget`, `Mid-range`, `Premium`)
96. Find top-rated budget laptops
97. Find processor performance trends
98. Analyze customer ratings
99. Find brands giving highest RAM at lowest price
100. Create final cleaned dataset for analysis
